creator: yzlai@csie.nctu.edu.tw
text:
While booting with 4.2 kernel,
it shows ida0: can't allocate memory resources
and can not find any devices attach on it.

My ida0 is <DEC/Compaq Smart Array 4200 controller>

Fix: 

use 4.2-BETA maybe ok, but my /usr/src was cvsuped to latest :(
How-To-Repeat: booting with 4.2-STABLE(RELEASE) kernel
